web.title: U-Pick Strawberry Picking at Jaemor Farms
web.description: Hours: Saturdays 10 am – 5 pm, Sundays 12 pm – 5 pm. Last ticket sold one hour before closing · Admission: $6 per person + tax · Gallon Box for Picking: $20 + tax.

web.title: Jaemor Farms | A Local Farm with Fresh Produce & Family Fun
web.description: Visit Jaemor Farms in Alto, GA, offering fresh produce, seasonal events, a bakery, and family fun in Hall, Banks, and Habersham counties!

web.title: Plan Your Visit to Jaemor Farms
web.description: Visit Jaemor Farms for a year-round experience! Pick fresh produce and enjoy seasonal events at the perfect farm to visit in North Georgia.
